## Use Case

Describe the backend AI workflow or problem this feature should support.

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the API, behavior, or integration you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any workaround or alternative design you considered.

## Compatibility Impact

Would this affect public APIs, provider behavior, configuration, or existing users?

## Additional Context

Add examples, links, or implementation notes that may help evaluate the request.
